function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Precompute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i + 1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_T[i + 1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Precompute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0) + (i < n - 1 ? suffix_T[i + 1] : 0);

    }

    // Compute T_after_C array

    const T_after_C = new Array(n).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            T_after_C[i] = suffix_T[i + 1];

        } else {

            T_after_C[i] = 0;

        }

    }

    // Compute sum_T_after_C_from_i array

    const sum_T_after_C_from_i = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        sum_T_after_C_from_i[i] = sum_T_after_C_from_i[i + 1] + T_after_C[i];

    }

    // Compute sum_L_before_C array

    const sum_L_before_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            sum_L_before_C[i + 1] = sum_L_before_C[i] + prefix_L[i];

        } else {

            sum_L_before_C[i + 1] = sum_L_before_C[i];

        }

    }

    // Compute original count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i + 1];

        }

    }

    // Now, compute the maximum gain

    let max_gain = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        // gain_L is sum_T_after_C_from_i[i]

        const gain_L = sum_T_after_C_from_i[i];

        // gain_C is prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i + 1]

        const gain_C = prefix_L[i] * (i < n ? suffix_T[i] : 0);

        // gain_T is sum_L_before_C[i]

        const gain_T = sum_L_before_C[i];

        const current_max = Math.max(gain_L, gain_C, gain_T);

        if (current_max > max_gain) {

            max_gain = current_max;

        }

    }

    return original_count + max_gain;

}

function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Precompute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T

    const prefix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i + 1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_T[i + 1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    const total_T = prefix_T[n];

    // Compute original_count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            const L_before = prefix_L[i];

            const T_after = total_T - prefix_T[i + 1];

            original_count += L_before * T_after;

        }

    }

    // Compute gain_L

    let gain_L = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            const T_after = total_T - prefix_T[i + 1];

            gain_L += T_after;

        }

    }

    // Compute gain_C

    let gain_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const L_before = prefix_L[i];

        const T_after = total_T - prefix_T[i];

        const current_gain = L_before * T_after;

        if (current_gain > gain_C) {

            gain_C = current_gain;

        }

    // Compute gain_T

    let gain_T = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const C_before = prefix_C[i];

        const current_gain = L_before * C_before;

        if (current_gain > gain_T) {

            gain_T = current_gain;

        }

    }

    // The maximum possible is original_count + max(gain_L, gain_C, gain_T)

    const max_gain = Math.max(gain_L, gain_C, gain_T);

    return original_count + max_gain;

}
